headline: Layoffs rise as US hiring slows to pandemic-era pace
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Emma Ockerman joins Josh Lipton on Asking for a Trend to assess the state of the labor market as layoffs rise and US businesses add workers at the slowest pace since the COVID-19 pandemic.

headline: Has The ADP (ADP) Share Price Slide Created A Valuation Opportunity?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Automatic Data Processing (ADP) is starting to look interesting at current levels, or if the price still feels rich for what you get. The stock last closed at US$201.28, with returns of a 0.4% decline over 7 days, a 6.4% decline over 30 days, a 20.4% decline year to date, and a 32.8% decline over 1 year, while the 3-year and 5-year returns sit at 1.1% and 20.5% respectively. Recent headlines around payroll and workforce management trends have kept attention on...

headline: TD Cowen Trims ADP Target to $208 Ahead of Q3, Maintains Hold
summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 31, TD Cowen lowered its price recommendation on Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) to $208 from $255. It reiterated a Hold rating on the stock. The firm said it had updated its model to reflect changes in […]
